sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.9.25: Render sync notice via admin_notices so it stays on main admin page, not inside calendar content.
  • 1.8.9.24: Force sync button to true circle and show sync notice only on main admin page after redirect.
  • 1.8.9.23: Make sync button fully round and move sync notice to main calendar page after redirect.
  • 1.8.9.22: Make calendar sync button icon-only and queue all MotoPress room iCal syncs together with Booking.com ICS sync.
  • 1.8.9.21: Restrict Booking.com auto-cancel to ICS skeleton bookings only.
  • 1.8.9.20: Clear calendar cache on plugin update so confirmed-only calendar rules apply immediately.
  • 1.8.9.19: Show only confirmed bookings on calendar.
  • 1.8.9.18: Hide cancelled bookings from calendar.
  • 1.8.9.17: Hide merged archive bookings from calendar so merged manual booking shows correctly.
  • 1.8.9.16: Fix Merge Bookings menu page to use working Booking Merges candidate view instead of broken empty query.
  • 1.8.8.91: Mark missing Booking.com reservations cancelled when ICS no longer shows their UID.
  • 1.8.8.90: Make room pricing use adults + children (babies excluded) in backend and live form previews.
  • 1.8.8.89: Add Booking Merges approval tool to combine same-channel same-date different-room bookings into one booking.
  • 1.8.8.88: Add Booking.com ICS grouping debug preview to inspect multi-room reservation keys before grouping imports.
  • 1.8.8.87: Keep Booking.com UID on transferred target bookings so later ICS syncs do not recreate them.
